creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dimitry Andric from comment #4)

Ah yes, that explains it.  But certainly, the bug is still there and causes compiler crashes.  What's the right way to proceed here?  Open a new bug for CURRENT?  Reopen this one with a note that it reproduces on CURRENT?  Upstream does seem to care a little about the bug and there is some movement every once in a while.
